overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a neon-lit nightclub with purple and cyan lighting where NPCs dance and socialize. The camera moves through the industrial-style club past a large Dia de los Muertos-inspired mural wall, exits through double doors with a beaded curtain, and emerges into a rainy cyberpunk city street with wet reflective pavement and towering buildings adorned with bright neon signage.

notable_agents.action: dancer in teal top and pink pants performing rhythmic movements near the table
group of patrons seated on black leather couches socializing and drinking

entered.detail: circular white table with glowing pink neon base illuminating the floor
linear magenta neon strips embedded in the dark floor
large purple wall mural featuring artistic skeleton figures and floral patterns
dark upholstered seating along the left wall with patrons seated

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cyberpunk nightclub lounge illuminated by vibrant purple and pink neon floor lights. The camera moves past round tables with glowing bases where NPCs are dancing, while other patrons relax on black leather couches. A large artistic mural featuring skeleton figures covers the far wall, establishing the club's alternative aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub dance floor with prominent skeleton mural wall

events.description: camera pans slightly left to follow the length of the mural wall

agents.ego_description: moving along the mural wall, passing pairs of dancing NPCs performing synchronized movements

notable_agents.action: pair of dancers with blue hair performing energetic synchronized dance routine

entered.detail: long horizontal cyan fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the club along a prominent wall covered in a detailed purple skeleton mural. Dancers perform in the center of the room beneath cyan neon ceiling tubes, while the camera tracks parallel to the mural, revealing more of the intricate artwork featuring skeletal figures in various poses.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub exit corridor approaching double doors

events.description: approaching the metal exit doors with illuminated green exit sign becoming visible overhead

agents.ego_description: moving toward the nightclub exit, passing remaining seated patrons near the wall

notable_agents.action: patron in yellow shirt sitting on bench near the exit door

entered.detail: double metal doors with small rectangular windows and push bars
illuminated green exit sign mounted above the doorway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the club's exit, leaving the main dance area behind. The skeleton mural recedes to the left as the focus shifts to the double metal exit doors ahead, marked by a green exit sign. A few patrons remain seated near the walls as the space becomes less crowded approaching the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor through beaded curtain divider

events.description: passing through the double metal doors from the interior into the exit corridor
moving through the hanging beaded curtain into the outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: exiting the nightclub through the metal doors and beaded curtain, transitioning from indoor to outdoor space

entered.detail: hanging curtain of black circular discs acting as a room divider and visual barrier
wet pavement and city lights visible through the exit opening

segments.scene_description: This short segment captures the transition from the nightclub interior to the outside. The camera passes through the metal double doors into a narrow corridor, then moves through a distinctive beaded curtain of black circular discs, revealing the rainy city street beyond with reflections of neon lights on wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk city street with neon signage and wet reflective surfaces

events.description: emerging from indoor nightclub into rainy outdoor urban environment with wet reflective streets and neon-lit buildings
turning slightly to survey the city street and surrounding cyberpunk architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy city street, observing the towering cyberpunk buildings and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the wet pavement in the rain

entered.detail: rain-soaked pavement reflecting the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall buildings adorned with bright pink and cyan neon advertisements and signage
vehicles parked along the right side of the street near the sidewalk
multi-story modern buildings with illuminated windows and industrial architecture

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the exterior cyberpunk city environment at night. The camera emerges onto a wet asphalt street where rain creates reflective surfaces mirroring the vibrant neon signs of pink and cyan. Tall buildings with illuminated advertisements tower overhead, and parked cars line the street as the camera explores the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk nightclub out into a rainy, nocturnal city street. It begins in a lounge illuminated by purple and pink floor lights, gliding past dancing patrons and leather couches toward a large, detailed mural of skeletal figures. As the camera tracks parallel to this artwork beneath cyan ceiling tubes, the dance floor recedes and the focus shifts toward a set of metal double doors marked by a green exit sign. The scene then transitions through a narrow corridor and a beaded curtain of black discs, moving from the enclosed club atmosphere into the open air. Finally, the camera emerges onto wet asphalt where rain-slicked pavements mirror the towering neon advertisements and glowing signage of the surrounding urban landscape.
